title: gonocarpus trichostachyus
intro: Gonocarpus trichostachyus, also known as Water Milfoil or Australian Water-milfoil, is a species of flowering plant in the family Haloragaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Its health benefits include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, and in some regions, it is also used in traditional herbal remedies.
